title: Private Izzy Murphy
writer: Raymond L. Schrock, Edward Clark, Philip Lonergan
actors: George Jessel, Patsy Ruth Miller, Vera Gordon
plot: Isadore "Izzy" Goldberg changes his name to I. Patrick Murphy because his store is in an Irish-neighborhood in New York City. He meets Eileen Cohannigan, the daughter of a meat-packer, and he tells her he is Irish and a romance be...
